sections.label: Impression
sections.placeholder: Concise, prioritised bullets. State the ACR BI-RADS 5th ed final assessment category on its own line (0 incomplete; 1 negative; 2 benign; 3 probably benign ≤2%, short-interval follow-up; 4A/4B/4C suspicious — biopsy; 5 highly suggestive ≥95% — biopsy; 6 known malignancy), consistent with the dominant mass's shape/orientation/margin, with management drawn from approved follow-up.
